name: Meringue Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg whites, salt, and cream of tartar until stiff peaks form.
2. Gradually add sugar while continuing to beat until glossy mounds form.
3. Gently fold in the chocolate chips.
4. Place cookies on a parchment-lined baking sheet or cover regular baking sheet with an air-space cookie sheet or brown grocery bag.
5. Drop by teaspoonful onto the prepared sheet.
6. Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 25 minutes, or until lightly browned.
7. Allow cookies to cool completely before consuming. Best enjoyed within a few days.
